User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information about a user's gameplay statistics, name, and streaks

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Authentication

username.description: Friendly nickname selected by the user

cumulativePoints.description: Total cumulative points across all games

highestStreak.description: Personal best streak in AI infinite mode

dailyStreak.description: Consecutive days completing the Daily Challenge

lastPlayed.description: UTC date of last Daily Challenge completion (YYYY-MM-DD)

Submission.title: User Fandom Submission
Submission.description: A subculture topic proposed by a user for community review

isReal.description: Is it a real fandom or fiction?

/users/{userId}.description: User profile statistics and game states

/submissions/{submissionId}.description: User fandom submissions audited by AI and open for public review
